# Aiyana Services

> Aiyana Services provides respite care, ADHD and Autism assessments, addiction support, and dual diagnosis care for children, youth, and adults in Edmonton, Alberta.

Aiyana Services is an RCAC-licensed provider offering compassionate, integrated support for families navigating complex care needs. We work with FSCD and PDD funding programs and offer 24/7 emergency respite support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Aiyana Services and our approach to integrated family care.
- [Services](/services): Full range of respite, assessment, and support services.
- [About](/about): Our mission and organizational values.
- [Our Mission](/about/mission): Purpose, values, and vision for integrated family care.
- [Careers](/about/careers): Job openings and how to join our team.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, and contact form for Edmonton families.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about services, assessments, funding, insurance, and staff qualifications.

## Services

- [Respite Care](/services/respite-care): Flexible respite care with trained caregivers and 24/7 availability.
- [ADHD Assessment](/services/adhd-assessment): Comprehensive ADHD evaluations with detailed diagnostic reports.
- [Autism Evaluation](/services/autism-evaluation): Gold-standard autism assessments (ADOS-2) across age groups.
- [Addiction Support](/services/addiction-support): Family-centered addiction treatment for youth.
- [Dual Diagnosis Care](/services/dual-diagnosis): Integrated care for co-occurring conditions.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle personal information.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of this website.
